individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty, infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Placements: About 80% of students in our course get internships at Dr. Reddy's Laboratories, Sun Pharma, and Hetero. Top roles offered are drug inspector, pharmacist, QA, QC, R&D, etc. We can also open our own medical shops.

individual_reviews.title: Our college is good for study, good environment, good faculty, good teaching, and good laboratories.

content.Placements: The college has very low placements. The lowest salary package offered is 3.5 LPA in our course. So many companies recruit students and almost 90% of students are doing internships in the final semester. The top course is offered and so many members are placed in our college.
content.Infrastructure: There are so many facilities like labs, a library, and classrooms with good infrastructure. I'm going to the library for an hour daily as there are so many reference books and materials. The facilities in our hostel are good. There are good meals, study halls, and sufficient rooms in our hostel. It is good to stay in our hostel.
